description: 8 - 23-12-2024 - Emails between Vincent Devine (Government Chief Security Officer, CO) and others
text:
others

Re: FW: FAST TRACK DV CLEARANCE REQUIRED FOR HIGH PROFILE HEAD OF
MISSION ROLE OVERSEAS

JCS < PERSONAL > 23 December 2024 at 09:52
To: JES < PERSONAL Fa
Cc: UKSV-serviceteam Mailbox < PERSONAL, >, Michael Roberts
< PERSONAL >, Gerard.McGurkPERSONAL.

JCS

No worries, | am working throughout apart from Christmas Day and Boxing Day and we will get a VCO sorted now in
anticipation of a quick turnaround. We will move the case into Special Handling unless that will cause your team any
challenges. Just to set expectations on this, we can only progress once the case arrives with us, so maybe we should
keep in touch until the application is completed and is live on our system.

Thanks
JCS
On Mon, 23 Dec 2024 at 09:31, JCS < PERSONAL > wrote:
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
JCS

| have had a few out of office message — so you are aware.

Merry Christmas

Jcs

JCS | Head of Personnel Security Team
Cluster 4 Security, Estates Security and Resilence Department, ESND
Personal | Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office, King Charles St | London | SW1A2AH
Telephone: Mobile: PERSONAL | email: PERSONAL

Vincent hi,

Yes, spoke to Gerard this evening and we're ready to support as necessary.

Michael

On Wed, 18 Dec 2024, 20:58 Vincent Devine, < PERSONAL > wrote:
Gerard,

20


Thanks. Got it. | am not familiar with the FCDO processes, but | assume you will initiate in the normal way and

support the individual in completing their bit of the process.

Michael,

Once we get the notification, can we have people stood by to take this forward asap. The SPAD work has shown

just how slick this can be when needed.

Grateful - given importance - if you could confirm you get this and are about tomorrow.
